description_long: This is a medium-sized, floor-standing wooden bookcase with a dark, natural wood grain finish. It features four horizontal shelves, three of which are filled with a variety of books in green, purple, and cream colors, some standing upright and others stacked or leaning. Two transparent jars are also placed on one of the middle shelves, adding a touch of utility and visual interest. The frame is sturdy, with thick vertical supports and open sides, giving it a robust yet open appearance. The back of the bookcase is open, allowing visibility through the shelves. The overall design is practical and slightly rustic, suitable for both home and urban public settings.
description: A dark wood, four-shelf bookcase filled with colorful books and jars, featuring a sturdy, open-sided frame and a rustic design.
description_view_0: Side view showing the thickness and wood grain of the vertical support, with no shelves or contents visible.
description_view_1: Front view displaying all four shelves, filled with books in green, purple, and cream, as well as two transparent jars.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring view 0, showing the vertical support's wood texture without revealing the shelves or contents.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the open back of the bookcase, with the books and jars visible but less colorful detail than the front.
